svg.text: General leaf collision probability by channel age
Poisson arrival model; one new finite-tree leaf per minute on average; y-axis is logarithmic.
P(collision by t) = 1 - exp(-mu(t)) * (1 + mu(t) / 2^d)^(2^d), where mu(t) = 1440t for t in days.
channel operating period (days), lambda = 1 new leaf/minute
